top_findings.title: Tests reimplement the app inline and never exercise app.py
top_findings.evidence: tests/test_api.py:14 create_test_app() duplicates the entire Flask app; grep shows no `import app`/`from app`, so app.py has no direct coverage (test_coverage=0.65 from scores.json)
top_findings.suggestion: Import the routes/factory from app.py in the tests so the production code under test is the code that ships
